pre_review_changes.topic: inspection subprocess inherited Claude OAuth context
pre_review_changes.action: Split inspection and run environment allowlists so inspection receives neither the controller key nor Claude OAuth state.

pre_review_changes.topic: dependency-blocked work could consume the runner attempt
pre_review_changes.action: Added controller-derived next_ready evidence and require it before the runner records an attempt.

opus_findings.topic: same-user mutation after the exact-SHA check
opus_findings.reason: The stated boundary does not claim containment of an arbitrary same-user malicious process, which can already alter the owner-only runner state or invoke the local CLI directly.

opus_findings.topic: a new signed digest at the same queue path is a fresh attempt
opus_findings.reason: A changed digest requires a separately valid signed release, while the controller still enforces release signature, activation, exact Base and Head, nonce, budget and the external one-use claim.

opus_findings.topic: worker credential stripping was outside the changed diff
opus_findings.reason: The unchanged bridge implementation and the passing child-environment tests prove that controller, GitHub, API-key, proxy and alternate-provider credentials are removed before Claude starts.
